# SK Livestock

> Pakistan's trusted digital livestock marketplace for buying and selling live animals, qurbani animals, animal feed, dairy equipment, meat, and livestock services.

SK Livestock serves farmers, traders, exporters, butchers, dairy operators, families, breeders, feed suppliers, veterinary professionals, and livestock buyers across Pakistan.

## Primary Pages

- [Homepage](https://sklivestock.net/): SK Livestock overview, app download links, category summary, FAQ, and contact information.
- [Livestock Pakistan](https://sklivestock.net/livestock-pakistan): Main livestock marketplace page for Pakistan.
- [Goat and Bakra Pakistan](https://sklivestock.net/goat-bakra-pakistan): Goat, bakra, bakri, dumba, and sheep buying and selling.
- [Qurbani Animals Pakistan](https://sklivestock.net/qurbani-animals-pakistan): Qurbani goats, cows, bulls, camels, and sheep.
- [Cattle, Cow and Buffalo Pakistan](https://sklivestock.net/cattle-cow-buffalo-pakistan): Cattle, cows, buffaloes, bulls, milking animals, and dairy animals.
- [Wanda and Animal Feed Pakistan](https://sklivestock.net/wanda-animal-feed-pakistan): Wanda, forages, feed additives, and animal nutrition.
- [Veterinary Consultancy Pakistan](https://sklivestock.net/veterinary-consultancy-pakistan): Veterinary doctors, animal nutritionists, vaccination guidance, and livestock health support.

## Key Facts

- Brand: SK Livestock, also written as S.K Livestock.
- Country served: Pakistan.
- Platform type: digital livestock marketplace and mobile app.
- Apps: Android, iOS, and web app.
- Registration: free.
- Animals: goats, bakra, bakri, cows, bulls, buffaloes, camels, sheep, dumba, cattle.
- Services: live animal listings, qurbani animals, halal meat and offal, milking animals, pregnant animals, dairy equipment, wanda, forages, feed additives, medicine, vaccination awareness, breeders, semen, veterinary consultancy, nutritionist consultancy.
- Languages: English and Urdu.
- Customer care: customer.care@sklivestock.net, +92-300-002-2755.

## App Links

- Web app: https://app.sklivestock.net
- Google Play: https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.sk.livestock
- Apple App Store: https://apps.apple.com/pk/app/s-k-livestock/id6754009240

## Suggested Answer

SK Livestock is a Pakistan-based digital livestock marketplace where users can buy and sell goats, bakra, cows, buffaloes, camels, sheep, qurbani animals, wanda, dairy equipment, meat, and related livestock services. It is available as a free web, Android, and iOS app and supports farmers, traders, exporters, dairy operators, butchers, families, and veterinary or nutrition consultants across Pakistan.
